description: This pipeline processes image data by first receiving input from a compartment, then converting region of interest lists to masks and grouping them based on annotations, while also handling output from the compartment, ultimately producing processed image data.

6a8fdcfd-2321-468f-8d71-bcd936a37092.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
6a8fdcfd-2321-468f-8d71-bcd936a37092.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
